remarks: Everything here is BRAND SPANKING NEW. LOW COMMON CHARGES too! Entirely gutted to the studs and tastefully renovated, this gorgeous 1 bedroom, 1 bath corner unit in a convenient upper Springdale neighborhood is the one you have been waiting for. A gleaming kitchen offers quartz counters, stylish backsplash, and stainless steel appliances. LVT floors throughout. A generous sized bedroom with wonderful custom closets. Unit comes with a new A/C unit, 3 WiFi heating zones, free laundry in the lower level and a storage area. Outside there are community picnic tables by a babbling brook - great for get-togethers, or a place to get outside and away from your desk. Assigned parking for owner and guest parking. The complex has had a new roof, new siding and new decking installed over the past year. It's a gem! Perfect for commuting - just minutes from Talmadge Hill and Springdale train stations and the Merritt Parkway. Move right in!
